text: Every target has an explicit support tier.
evidence_required: support matrix with native_skill_root, portable_root_installed, adapter_needed, skipped, or blocked

text: Known targets use installer target names and custom roots use target-path.
evidence_required: install command trace for --target and --target-path use

text: Applied roots have validation, hash, and rollback evidence.
evidence_required: per-target plan JSON, validation log, sha256 comparison, and backup path

text: Portable support is not described as native runtime discovery.
evidence_required: support matrix caveat for portable/projection targets
